title: rhododendron elliottii
intro: Rhododendron elliottii, also known as the scrub rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron elliottii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
